name: Collision Crystal
description: This delicately balanced weapon settles into your grip as if you had wielded it for years. Its blue-gray hue shimmers as you heft the weapon. A collision weapon temporarily increases its own mass at the end point of each swing or shot. When you wield such a weapon, you deal an extra 5 points of damage with each hit. Projectile weapons bestow this property upon their ammunition.
unidentifiedDesc: A blue-gray shimmering weapon augmentation crystal.
